caption: The video captures a group of soccer players during a pre-game warm-up session on a well-maintained grass field. The players, dressed in matching blue jerseys with green shorts and socks, are performing dynamic stretching exercises. Some players are kneeling while extending one leg forward, engaging in a lunge stretch to prepare their muscles for the game. Others are standing and appear to be assisting or observing the stretching routine. The background features an empty stadium with red and white seats, and advertisements for brands like Coca-Cola and LaLiga are visible, indicating that this is likely a professional match setting. The atmosphere suggests a focused and disciplined team preparing for an upcoming game.
